message:
feat(policy): integrate IngestionPipeline into PolicyEngine for event ingestion governance

Add IngestionPipeline as 15th subsystem in PolicyEngine. Wire config through
SafetyConfig, add accessor methods, feed events_received/rejected into the
metrics dashboard, and add 3 integration tests.

PolicyEngine now integrates: RateLimiter, DecisionLog, QuarantineRegistry,
AuditChain, ComplianceEngine, CredentialBroker, LifecycleManager,
DataClassifier, ConnectorGovernor, ConnectorRegistry, ConnectorHostRuntime,
ReliabilityRegistry, BundleRegistry, ConnectorMesh, IngestionPipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
